fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the configuration package.

fields.name: Package Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the package.

fields.name: Language ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the Windows language to use for the configuration package. Choose the field and select a language ID from the list.

fields.name: No. of Tables
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of tables that the package contains.

fields.name: Product Version
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version of the product that you are configuring. You can use this field to help differentiate among various versions of a solution.

fields.name: Exclude Config. Tables
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to exclude configuration tables from the package. Select the check box to exclude these types of tables.

fields.name: Processing Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order in which the package is to be processed.

fields.name: No. of Records
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of records in the package.

fields.name: No. of Errors
fields.tooltip: Specifies the count of package errors. One line reflects one field of a record that failed validation.
